form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Most recently favourite; won by a head at Toowoomba 3yo SW March 27 over 1625m defeating Go Maro carrying 57kg at $2.70. The start before that favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 1.1 len at this track 3yo Bm68 March 11 over 1350m on a soft track defeating Lonesome Soul with 56.5kg at $4.20. Takes on a stiffer challenge but hard to knock on that form.
